summary: AgentForge v3.2 - Playable Demo testing complete. All demo endpoints working: GET /api/demos/{project_id}, GET /api/demos/{project_id}/latest, GET /api/demos/{project_id}/web, POST /api/demos/{project_id}/regenerate. Frontend 'Play Demo' button and dialog fully functional with Web Demo, Executable options, demo features, and controls guide.

issues: Console warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue from previous version

passed_tests: ✅ playable_demos feature is listed in API features
✅ GET /api/demos/{project_id}/latest - returns latest ready demo with all required fields
✅ GET /api/demos/{project_id}/web - returns HTML content with text/html content-type
✅ POST /api/demos/fake_project/regenerate - returns 404 correctly for non-existent projects
✅ PlayableDemo model has web_demo_html for HTML5/WebGL demo
✅ Demo is properly linked to completed build
✅ Frontend: 'Play Demo' button appears when demo is ready
✅ Frontend: Demo dialog shows 'Playable Demo Ready!' title
✅ Frontend: Web Demo section with 'Play in Browser' button
✅ Frontend: Executable section with 'View Demo Files' button
✅ Frontend: Demo Features badges displayed (World exploration, AI/NPC interactions, UI framework demo)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All v3.2 demo UI features accessible and functional)

seed_data_creation: Demo regeneration triggered during testing, creating a ready demo for the test project
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentForge v3.2 Playable Demo feature fully tested. Key features: 1) Demo endpoints: GET /api/demos/{project_id} returns list, GET /api/demos/{project_id}/latest returns ready demo, GET /api/demos/{project_id}/web returns HTML content, POST /api/demos/{project_id}/regenerate triggers regeneration. 2) PlayableDemo model includes: id, project_id, build_id, status, demo_type, target_engine, web_demo_html, systems_included, demo_features, controls_guide. 3) Frontend: 'Play Demo' button appears in header when demo is ready, dialog has Web Demo and Executable options. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_v32_playable_demos.py covers all v3.2 demo endpoints.

endpoints: GET /api/demos/{project_id}/web - returns HTML content for web demo
POST /api/demos/{project_id}/regenerate - regenerates demo from last build

features_verified: Play Demo button in header (appears when demo ready)
Demo dialog with 'Playable Demo Ready!' title
Web Demo section with Play in Browser button
Executable section with View Demo Files button

web_demo_generation.notes: PRISM agent generates complete HTML5 playable demo with game loop, controls, HUD, combat, and NPC interactions
